description.en: Preserving and sharing the rich cultural heritage of the Afar people
description.afar: Qafar Qaada kee abuk raqtih daaran dacrisaanama
description.am: የአፋር ህዝብ የበለጸገ ባህላዊ ቅርስን መጠበቅ እና ማስተላለፍ

hero.title: Discover the Rich Heritage of the Afar People
hero.subtitle: Explore the ancient traditions, customary laws, and nomadic lifestyle of one of the Horn of Africa's most resilient cultures

about.title: The Afar People: Guardians of the Danakil
about.content: The Afar people, also known as the Danakil, are a Cushitic ethnic group inhabiting the Horn of Africa. Primarily residing in the Afar Region of Ethiopia, northern Djibouti, and southern Eritrea, they are renowned for their resilience in one of the hottest and most inhospitable environments on Earth - the Danakil Depression.

features.title: Traditional Culture
features.description: Discover the unique customs, ceremonies, and social structures that define Afar identity

features.title: Customary Law (Mada'a)
features.description: Understand the traditional legal system that has governed Afar society for generations

features.title: Pastoral Lifestyle
features.description: Explore the nomadic traditions and the deep connection between Afar people and their land

hero.title: Qafar Qaadaay, abuk-raqti kee nihiritte sinnih ixigaay, eysexeexega.
hero.subtitle: Qafar qaadaay, madaqa kee kalah tan nihiritte bayeh uma nagra kinnuk takkel mangom teetik geetton.

about.title: Qafar Qaada
about.content: Qafar baaxoy baadol mangonnal tamixxige, Afrikah gaysal guubuh tan inki afaat, Qaadaay, diini kee amolladih inki kinnaane le ummatta kinnim tamixxige. Axcih, Itiyoppiyak Qafar Rakaakayaay, Jabuuti Eretriyal Geytimta ummattaay, kaxxaam baadal muxxo le baaxo kinnim dubuh hinnay niqanah baadal tamixxige baaxooxak tiyak teenal tamixxige.

hero.title: የአፋር ህዝብ የበለጸገ ቅርስ ይወቁ
hero.subtitle: በአፍሪካ ቀንድ ከሚገኙት በጣም ጠንካራ ባህሎች መካከል አንዱ የሆነውን ጥንታዊ ወጎችን፣ ባህላዊ ህጎችና  የአኗኗር ዘይበ እዚህ ያገኙ

about.title: የአፋር ህዝብ
about.content: የአፋር ሕዝብ ከኩሽ ነገዶች አንዱ እንደሆነ ይነገራል። ከክርስቶስ ልደት በፊት ከ500 ዓ.ዓ እስከ 15 ዓ.ም ድረስ ከየመን፣ ከግብጽ፣ ከአክሱም ነገሥታት ጋር ግንኙነት እንደነበራቸውና በስተሰሜን ከዳህላክ ደሴቶች ጀምሮ በስተደቡብ እስከ ዘይላ ድረስ ባለው አካባቢ እንደኖሩ ይነገራል።

features.title: ባህላዊ ወጎች
features.description: የአፋርን ማንነት የሚገልጹ ልዩ ልማዶችን ያግኙ

features.title: ልማዳዊ ህግ
features.description: የአፋርን ማህበረሰብ ለትውልድ ሲያስተዳድር የቆየውን ባህላዊ የህግ ስርዓት ይረዱ

features.title: አርብቶ አደር አኗኗር
features.description: በአፋር ህዝብ እና በመሬታቸው መካከል ያለውን ጥልቅ ግንኙነት ይማሩ

hero.title: Afar Culture & Traditions
hero.subtitle: Discover the ancient customs, social structures, and cultural practices that define Afar identity

intro.title: Social Structure & Clan System
intro.content: Afar society is organized around a complex clan system...

elements.title: Traditional Attire
elements.preview: The Sanafil and Shash for men, Gambo for women, and the iconic Jile dagger.

elements.title: Oral Traditions
elements.preview: Poetry (Gabay), proverbs, and folk songs preserve history and knowledge.

elements.title: Marriage Customs
elements.preview: Arranged marriages with bride wealth (Lebe) and Absuma preference.

elements.title: Ceremonies & Festivals
elements.preview: Births, circumcisions, weddings, and funerals marked by community celebrations.

elements.title: Hospitality (Qaffu)
elements.preview: Sacred duty to welcome guests with milk, meat, and Ali.

elements.title: Peacemaking (Mabla)
elements.preview: Reconciliation and compensation through elder mediation.
